task: Find the latest Doraemon video in MP4 format that is over 20 minutes long and has a medium file size.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by finding a Doraemon video on 4shared that satisfies all requested constraints and identifying the latest one among the filtered results. Evidence: it discovered the site’s filter parameters from page source, then opened a filtered/sorted search URL with category=video, type=mp4, duration=l (20+ minutes), size=m (10–100 MB), and sort=time,desc (newest first). The resulting page showed 12 matching files, with the top result listed as the newest: 'Doraemon Aventura En El Tiempo_ El Misterio De La Figura De Nobita _ La Puerta Sin Casa(360P).mp4', duration 22:24, uploaded 9 months ago. Parsed HTML from the filtered results confirmed this top card had ext mp4, size 63,421 KB, owner Angelyamaltm, date 9 months ago, and the detail-page URL. On the file detail page, the snapshot showed the same file name, MP4 tag, upload age 9 months ago, and size 63,421 KB; the video element duration was programmatically read as 1343.99 seconds (~22:24), confirming duration over 20 minutes. Thus the latest matching Doraemon MP4 with medium file size was correctly found and reported.
final_result_response:
Found it. I went back to the filtered search results and opened the first result via the thumbnail “File details” link.

**Latest matching Doraemon MP4 over 20 minutes, medium size:**

action_history: Searching 4shared for Doraemon videos: await page.locator('e3').fill('Doraemon mp4');
Searching 4shared for Doraemon videos: await page.locator('e4').click();
Checking video filter and sorting options: await page.locator('e7').click();
Applying filters for latest medium MP4 videos over 20 minutes: await openTab(url2);
Opening the newest matching file details: await page.locator('e13').click();
Opening the first result details page: await page.locator('e12').click();
Expanding more details for the file: await page.locator('e6').click();
Checking the video element duration: await page.keyboard.press('Escape');
